source: live NXT Jira via Atlassian MCP

tier_caution.NXT-33518: Module field in Jira = 'Inventory' not 'Item Management'; however ticket is a child of epic NXT-36067 (IM - Item Units & Sub-types) and AC directly describes the Units card decimal/whole-number option. Usable but note the module mismatch.
tier_caution.NXT-30036: AC confirms Description required and Tags/global info fields; 250-char limit appears in Description only, not AC.
tier_caution.NXT-30037: AC confirms 3 dropdowns required but does not enumerate field names. Product field names from Description.
tier_caution.NXT-37110: Three-tier maximum hard cap not in AC. Description discusses multi-tier structure but no explicit 3-tier ceiling in AC text.
tier_caution.NXT-37568: Costing auto-scaling calculation (divide-down formula) in Description only. AC only confirms 'optional Costing step' and FMV requirement.
tier_caution.NXT-30100: AC is minimal (2 bullets). Edible Yield Factor, Sub Ingredients, Standard Recipe Directions, Buy American / Locally Grown fields in Description only. CRITICAL: NXT-47249 AC explicitly states Yield Factor was MOVED from Ingredient Info to Units card — presenter described it on Ingredient Info, which is outdated behavior.
tier_caution.NXT-30102: AC does not list specific meal pattern components (Meat/Meat Alt, Grains, Veg, etc.). Field names from Description only.
tier_caution.NXT-39594: AC is brief (3 bullets); 'Disabled status' before menu item configured, tab rename behavior from Description/mockups.
tier_caution.NXT-30155: AC confirms structural elements (tabs, Set All Prices) but does not enumerate individual Menu Item fields. Field-level detail from Description.
tier_caution.NXT-54229: Inventory locking rule (Base Unit / Decimals locked after first Inventory transaction) is concept-confirmed in NXT-54229 but explicit locking language is in Description of NXT-37111 and NXT-54229, not AC.
tier_caution.NXT-36583: Pre-Prep Instructions, Prep Time, Cook Time, and HACCP process names (No Cook / Same Day Service / Complex Food) are in Description only. AC only confirms HACCP Process selection exists.
tier_caution.NXT-41273: 5 MB max file size and specific file types (JPEG, PNG, PDF, Word, spreadsheets) stated by presenter — not in AC or RN text. RN says 'up to 10 files' but no size limit stated.
